query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.171 (commit: 7a65160e).

## Issue to Resolve

Regression: can't select deck in add screen
Also, I can't change decks in the note editor


https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/69634269/91e7b6db-ef3e-4048-b9dd-30545b4405ce

_Originally posted by @BrayanDSO in https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/issues/14171#issuecomment-1697548993_

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/DeckSpinnerSelection.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.text: I'll help you resolve this regression issue where users can't select decks in the add screen or note editor. Let me start by analyzing the relevant files.

conversation_history.content:
1тЖТ/*
  2тЖТ * Copyright (c) 2022 Akshay Jadhav <jadhavakshay0701@gmail.com>
  3тЖТ *
  4тЖТ * This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under
  5тЖТ * the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software
  6тЖТ * Foundation; either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later
  7тЖТ * version.
  8тЖТ *
  9тЖТ * This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY
 10тЖТ * WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
 11тЖТ * PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.
 12тЖТ *
 13тЖТ * You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with
 14тЖТ * this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 15тЖТ */
 16тЖТpackage com.ichi2.anki
 17тЖТ
 18тЖТimport android.view.MotionEvent
 19тЖТimport android.view.View
 20тЖТimport android.view.ViewGroup
 21тЖТimport android.widget.ArrayAdapter
 22тЖТimport android.widget.Spinner
 23тЖТimport android.widget.TextView
 24тЖТimport androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBar
 25тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog
 26тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck
 27тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck.Companion.fromCollection
 28тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.widgets.DeckDropDownAdapter
 29тЖТimport com.ichi2.libanki.*
 30тЖТimport com.ichi2.libanki.Collection
 31тЖТimport com.ichi2.utils.FragmentManagerSupplier
 32тЖТimport com.ichi2.utils.asFragmentManagerSupplier
 33тЖТimport timber.log.Timber
 34тЖТ
 35тЖТ/**
 36тЖТ * Handles expansion of a [Spinner], allowing a press to display a [DeckSelectionDialog]
 37тЖТ * Responsible for filtering the decks to display in the [DeckSelectionDialog]
 38тЖТ *
 39тЖТ * Populates the spinner with data, and handles display of the selected deck within the spinner control
 40тЖТ *
 41тЖТ * @param spinner
 42тЖТ * The spinner displayed in the activity.
 43тЖТ * Empty at construction. After initialization, it contains in this order:
 44тЖТ * 1. "All decks" if [showAllDecks] is true
 45тЖТ * 2. All decks from [mAllDeckIds].
 46тЖТ * @param showAllDecks Whether the deck selection should allow "All Decks" as an option
 47тЖТ * @param alwaysShowDefault If true, never hide the default deck. If false, match [DeckPicker]'s logic
 48тЖТ * @param showFilteredDecks whether to show filtered decks
 49тЖТ */
 50тЖТclass DeckSpinnerSelection(
 51тЖТ    private val context: AnkiActivity,
 52тЖТ    private val collection: Collection,
 53тЖТ    private val spinner: Spinner,
 54тЖТ    private val showAllDecks: Boolean,
 55тЖТ    private val alwaysShowDefault: Boolean,
 56тЖТ    private val showFilteredDecks: Boolean
 57тЖТ) {
 58тЖТ    /**
 59тЖТ     * All of the decks shown to the user.
 60тЖТ     */
 61тЖТ    private lateinit var mAllDeckIds: ArrayList<Long>
 62тЖТ
 63тЖТ    private val mFragmentManagerSupplier: FragmentManagerSupplier = context.asFragmentManagerSupplier()
 64тЖТ
 65тЖТ    lateinit var dropDownDecks: List<DeckNameId>
 66тЖТ        private set
 67тЖТ    private var mDeckDropDownAdapter: DeckDropDownAdapter? = null
 68тЖТ
 69тЖТ    fun initializeActionBarDeckSpinner(actionBar: ActionBar) {
 70тЖТ        actionBar.setDisplayShowTitleEnabled(false)
 71тЖТ
 72тЖТ        // Add drop-down menu to select deck to action bar.
 73тЖТ        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = showFilteredDecks)
 74тЖТ        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 75тЖТ        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 76тЖТ            val thisDid = d.id
 77тЖТ            mAllDeckIds.add(thisDid)
 78тЖТ        }
 79тЖТ        mDeckDropDownAdapter = DeckDropDownAdapter(context, dropDownDecks)
 80тЖТ        spinner.adapter = mDeckDropDownAdapter
 81тЖТ        setSpinnerListener()
 82тЖТ    }
 83тЖТ
 84тЖТ    fun initializeNoteEditorDeckSpinner() {
 85тЖТ        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = false)
 86тЖТ        val deckNames = ArrayList<String>(dropDownDecks.size)
 87тЖТ        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 88тЖТ        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 89тЖТ            val currentName = d.name
 90тЖТ            deckNames.add(currentName)
 91тЖТ        }
 92тЖТ        val noteDeckAdapter: ArrayAdapter<String?> = object : ArrayAdapter<String?>(context, R.layout.multiline_spinner_item, deckNames as List<String?>) {
 93тЖТ            override fun getDropDownView(position: Int, convertView: View?, parent: ViewGroup): View {
 94тЖТ                // Cast the drop down items (popup items) as text view
 95тЖТ                val tv = super.getDropDownView(position, convertView, parent) as TextView
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ                // If this item is selected
 98тЖТ                if (position == spinner.selectedItemPosition) {
 99тЖТ                    tv.setBackgroundColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_background))
100тЖТ                    tv.setTextColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_text))
101тЖТ                }
102тЖТ
103тЖТ                // Return the modified view
104тЖТ                return tv
105тЖТ            }
106тЖТ        }
107тЖТ        spinner.adapter = noteDeckAdapter
108тЖТ        setSpinnerListener()
109тЖТ    }
110тЖТ
111тЖТ    /**
112тЖТ     * @return All decks, except maybe default if it should be hidden.
113тЖТ     */
114тЖТ    fun computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered: Boolean): List<DeckNameId> {
115тЖТ        return collection.decks.allNamesAndIds(skipEmptyDefault = true, includeFiltered = includeFiltered)
116тЖТ    }
117тЖТ
118тЖТ    fun setSpinnerListener() {
119тЖТ        spinner.setOnTouchListener { _: View?, motionEvent: MotionEvent ->
120тЖТ            if (motionEvent.action == MotionEvent.ACTION_UP) {
121тЖТ                displayDeckSelectionDialog(collection)
122тЖТ            }
123тЖТ            true
124тЖТ        }
125тЖТ        setSpinnerVisibility(View.VISIBLE)
126тЖТ    }
127тЖТ
128тЖТ    /**
129тЖТ     * Move the selected deck in the spinner to [deckId].
130тЖТ     * Timber if [deckId] is not an id of a known deck.
131тЖТ     * @param deckId The ID of the deck to select
132тЖТ     */
133тЖТ    fun updateDeckPosition(deckId: DeckId) {
134тЖТ        val position = mAllDeckIds.indexOf(deckId)
135тЖТ        if (position != -1) {
136тЖТ            spinner.setSelection(position)
137тЖТ        } else {
138тЖТ            Timber.w("updateDeckPosition() error :: deckId=%d, position=%d", deckId, position)
139тЖТ        }
140тЖТ    }
141тЖТ
142тЖТ    fun notifyDataSetChanged() {
143тЖТ        mDeckDropDownAdapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
144тЖТ    }
145тЖТ
146тЖТ    fun setEnabledActionBarSpinner(enabled: Boolean) {
147тЖТ        spinner.isEnabled = enabled
148тЖТ    }
149тЖТ
150тЖТ    fun setSpinnerVisibility(view: Int) {
151тЖТ        spinner.visibility = view
152тЖТ    }
153тЖТ
154тЖТ    /**
155тЖТ     * Iterates the drop down decks, and selects the one matching the given id.
156тЖТ     * @param deckId The deck id to be selected.
157тЖТ     * @param setAsCurrentDeck If true, deckId will be set as the current deck id of Collection
158тЖТ     * (this means the deck selected here will continue to appear in any future Activity whose
159тЖТ     * display data is loaded from Collection's current deck). If false, deckId will not be set as
160тЖТ     * the current deck id of Collection.
161тЖТ     * @return True if selection succeeded.
162тЖТ     */
163тЖТ    fun selectDeckById(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
164тЖТ        return if (deckId == ALL_DECKS_ID) {
165тЖТ            selectAllDecks()
166тЖТ        } else {
167тЖТ            selectDeck(deckId, setAsCurrentDeck)
168тЖТ        }
169тЖТ    }
170тЖТ
171тЖТ    /**
172тЖТ     * select in the spinner deck with id
173тЖТ     * @param deckId The deck id to search (not ALL_DECKS_ID)
174тЖТ     * @param setAsCurrentDeck whether this deck should be selected in the collection (if it exists)
175тЖТ     * @return whether it was found
176тЖТ     */
177тЖТ    private fun selectDeck(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
178тЖТ        for (dropDownDeckIdx in mAllDeckIds.indices) {
179тЖТ            if (mAllDeckIds[dropDownDeckIdx] == deckId) {
180тЖТ                val position = if (showAllDecks) dropDownDeckIdx + 1 else dropDownDeckIdx
181тЖТ                spinner.setSelection(position)
182тЖТ                if (setAsCurrentDeck) {
183тЖТ                    collection.decks.select(deckId)
184тЖТ                }
185тЖТ                return true
186тЖТ            }
187тЖТ        }
188тЖТ        return false
189тЖТ    }
190тЖТ
191тЖТ    /**
192тЖТ     * Select all decks. Must be called only if [showAllDecks].
193тЖТ     * @return whether selection was a success.
194тЖТ     */
195тЖТ    fun selectAllDecks(): Boolean {
196тЖТ        if (!showAllDecks) {
197тЖТ            CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport("selectAllDecks was called while `showAllDecks is false`", "DeckSpinnerSelection:selectAllDecks")
198тЖТ            return false
199тЖТ        }
200тЖТ        spinner.setSelection(0)
201тЖТ        return true
202тЖТ    }
203тЖТ
204тЖТ    /**
205тЖТ     * Displays a [DeckSelectionDialog]
206тЖТ     */
207тЖТ    fun displayDeckSelectionDialog(col: Collection?) {
208тЖТ        val decks = fromCollection(col!!, includeFiltered = false).toMutableList()
209тЖТ        if (showAllDecks) {
210тЖТ            decks.add(SelectableDeck(ALL_DECKS_ID, context.resources.getString(R.string.card_browser_all_decks)))
211тЖТ        }
212тЖТ        val dialog = DeckSelectionDialog.newInstance(context.getString(R.string.search_deck), null, false, decks)
213тЖТ        AnkiActivity.showDialogFragment(mFragmentManagerSupplier.getFragmentManager(), dialog)
214тЖТ    }
215тЖТ
216тЖТ    companion object {
217тЖТ        const val ALL_DECKS_ID = 0L
218тЖТ    }
219тЖТ}
220тЖТ

 16тЖТpackage com.ichi2.anki
 17тЖТ
 18тЖТimport android.view.MotionEvent
 19тЖТimport android.view.View
 20тЖТimport android.view.ViewGroup
 21тЖТimport android.widget.ArrayAdapter
 22тЖТimport android.widget.Spinner
 23тЖТimport android.widget.TextView
 24тЖТimport androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBar
 25тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog
 26тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck
 27тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck.Companion.fromCollection
 28тЖТimport com.ichi2.anki.widgets.DeckDropDownAdapter
 29тЖТimport com.ichi2.libanki.*
 30тЖТimport com.ichi2.libanki.Collection
 31тЖТimport com.ichi2.utils.FragmentManagerSupplier
 32тЖТimport com.ichi2.utils.asFragmentManagerSupplier
 33тЖТimport timber.log.Timber
 34тЖТ
 35тЖТ/**
 36тЖТ * Handles expansion of a [Spinner], allowing a press to display a [DeckSelectionDialog]
 37тЖТ * Responsible for filtering the decks to display in the [DeckSelectionDialog]
 38тЖТ *
 39тЖТ * Populates the spinner with data, and handles display of the selected deck within the spinner control
 40тЖТ *
 41тЖТ * @param spinner
 42тЖТ * The spinner displayed in the activity.
 43тЖТ * Empty at construction. After initialization, it contains in this order:
 44тЖТ * 1. "All decks" if [showAllDecks] is true
 45тЖТ * 2. All decks from [mAllDeckIds].
 46тЖТ * @param showAllDecks Whether the deck selection should allow "All Decks" as an option
 47тЖТ * @param alwaysShowDefault If true, never hide the default deck. If false, match [DeckPicker]'s logic
 48тЖТ * @param showFilteredDecks whether to show filtered decks
 49тЖТ */
 50тЖТclass DeckSpinnerSelection(
 51тЖТ    private val context: AnkiActivity,
 52тЖТ    private val collection: Collection,
 53тЖТ    private val spinner: Spinner,
 54тЖТ    private val showAllDecks: Boolean,
 55тЖТ    private val alwaysShowDefault: Boolean,
 56тЖТ    private val showFilteredDecks: Boolean
 57тЖТ) {
 58тЖТ    /**
 59тЖТ     * All of the decks shown to the user.
 60тЖТ     */
 61тЖТ    private lateinit var mAllDeckIds: ArrayList<Long>
 62тЖТ
 63тЖТ    private val mFragmentManagerSupplier: FragmentManagerSupplier = context.asFragmentManagerSupplier()
 64тЖТ
 65тЖТ    lateinit var dropDownDecks: List<DeckNameId>
 66тЖТ        private set
 67тЖТ    private var mDeckDropDownAdapter: DeckDropDownAdapter? = null
 68тЖТ
 69тЖТ    fun initializeActionBarDeckSpinner(actionBar: ActionBar) {
 70тЖТ        actionBar.setDisplayShowTitleEnabled(false)
 71тЖТ
 72тЖТ        // Add drop-down menu to select deck to action bar.
 73тЖТ        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = showFilteredDecks)
 74тЖТ        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 75тЖТ        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 76тЖТ            val thisDid = d.id
 77тЖТ            mAllDeckIds.add(thisDid)
 78тЖТ        }
 79тЖТ        mDeckDropDownAdapter = DeckDropDownAdapter(context, dropDownDecks)
 80тЖТ        spinner.adapter = mDeckDropDownAdapter
 81тЖТ        setSpinnerListener()
 82тЖТ    }
 83тЖТ
 84тЖТ    fun initializeNoteEditorDeckSpinner() {
 85тЖТ        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = false)
 86тЖТ        val deckNames = ArrayList<String>(dropDownDecks.size)
 87тЖТ        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 88тЖТ        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 89тЖТ            val currentName = d.name
 90тЖТ            deckNames.add(currentName)
 91тЖТ        }
 92тЖТ        val noteDeckAdapter: ArrayAdapter<String?> = object : ArrayAdapter<String?>(context, R.layout.multiline_spinner_item, deckNames as List<String?>) {
 93тЖТ            override fun getDropDownView(position: Int, convertView: View?, parent: ViewGroup): View {
 94тЖТ                // Cast the drop down items (popup items) as text view
 95тЖТ                val tv = super.getDropDownView(position, convertView, parent) as TextView
 96тЖТ
 97тЖТ                // If this item is selected
 98тЖТ                if (position == spinner.selectedItemPosition) {
 99тЖТ                    tv.setBackgroundColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_background))
100тЖТ                    tv.setTextColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_text))
101тЖТ                }
102тЖТ
103тЖТ                // Return the modified view
104тЖТ                return tv
105тЖТ            }
106тЖТ        }
107тЖТ        spinner.adapter = noteDeckAdapter
108тЖТ        setSpinnerListener()
109тЖТ    }
110тЖТ
111тЖТ    /**
112тЖТ     * @return All decks, except maybe default if it should be hidden.
113тЖТ     */
114тЖТ    fun computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered: Boolean): List<DeckNameId> {
115тЖТ        return collection.decks.allNamesAndIds(skipEmptyDefault = true, includeFiltered = includeFiltered)
116тЖТ    }
117тЖТ
118тЖТ    fun setSpinnerListener() {
119тЖТ        spinner.setOnTouchListener { _: View?, motionEvent: MotionEvent ->
120тЖТ            if (motionEvent.action == MotionEvent.ACTION_UP) {
121тЖТ                displayDeckSelectionDialog(collection)
122тЖТ            }
123тЖТ            true
124тЖТ        }
125тЖТ        setSpinnerVisibility(View.VISIBLE)
126тЖТ    }
127тЖТ
128тЖТ    /**
129тЖТ     * Move the selected deck in the spinner to [deckId].
130тЖТ     * Timber if [deckId] is not an id of a known deck.
131тЖТ     * @param deckId The ID of the deck to select
132тЖТ     */
133тЖТ    fun updateDeckPosition(deckId: DeckId) {
134тЖТ        val position = mAllDeckIds.indexOf(deckId)
135тЖТ        if (position != -1) {
136тЖТ            spinner.setSelection(position)
137тЖТ        } else {
138тЖТ            Timber.w("updateDeckPosition() error :: deckId=%d, position=%d", deckId, position)
139тЖТ        }
140тЖТ    }
141тЖТ
142тЖТ    fun notifyDataSetChanged() {
143тЖТ        mDeckDropDownAdapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
144тЖТ    }
145тЖТ
146тЖТ    fun setEnabledActionBarSpinner(enabled: Boolean) {
147тЖТ        spinner.isEnabled = enabled
148тЖТ    }
149тЖТ
150тЖТ    fun setSpinnerVisibility(view: Int) {
151тЖТ        spinner.visibility = view
152тЖТ    }
153тЖТ
154тЖТ    /**
155тЖТ     * Iterates the drop down decks, and selects the one matching the given id.
156тЖТ     * @param deckId The deck id to be selected.
157тЖТ     * @param setAsCurrentDeck If true, deckId will be set as the current deck id of Collection
158тЖТ     * (this means the deck selected here will continue to appear in any future Activity whose
159тЖТ     * display data is loaded from Collection's current deck). If false, deckId will not be set as
160тЖТ     * the current deck id of Collection.
161тЖТ     * @return True if selection succeeded.
162тЖТ     */
163тЖТ    fun selectDeckById(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
164тЖТ        return if (deckId == ALL_DECKS_ID) {
165тЖТ            selectAllDecks()
166тЖТ        } else {
167тЖТ            selectDeck(deckId, setAsCurrentDeck)
168тЖТ        }
169тЖТ    }
170тЖТ
171тЖТ    /**
172тЖТ     * select in the spinner deck with id
173тЖТ     * @param deckId The deck id to search (not ALL_DECKS_ID)
174тЖТ     * @param setAsCurrentDeck whether this deck should be selected in the collection (if it exists)
175тЖТ     * @return whether it was found
176тЖТ     */
177тЖТ    private fun selectDeck(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
178тЖТ        for (dropDownDeckIdx in mAllDeckIds.indices) {
179тЖТ            if (mAllDeckIds[dropDownDeckIdx] == deckId) {
180тЖТ                val position = if (showAllDecks) dropDownDeckIdx + 1 else dropDownDeckIdx
181тЖТ                spinner.setSelection(position)
182тЖТ                if (setAsCurrentDeck) {
183тЖТ                    collection.decks.select(deckId)
184тЖТ                }
185тЖТ                return true
186тЖТ            }
187тЖТ        }
188тЖТ        return false
189тЖТ    }
190тЖТ
191тЖТ    /**
192тЖТ     * Select all decks. Must be called only if [showAllDecks].
193тЖТ     * @return whether selection was a success.
194тЖТ     */
195тЖТ    fun selectAllDecks(): Boolean {
196тЖТ        if (!showAllDecks) {
197тЖТ            CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport("selectAllDecks was called while `showAllDecks is false`", "DeckSpinnerSelection:selectAllDecks")
198тЖТ            return false
199тЖТ        }
200тЖТ        spinner.setSelection(0)
201тЖТ        return true
202тЖТ    }
203тЖТ
204тЖТ    /**
205тЖТ     * Displays a [DeckSelectionDialog]
206тЖТ     */
207тЖТ    fun displayDeckSelectionDialog(col: Collection?) {
208тЖТ        val decks = fromCollection(col!!, includeFiltered = false).toMutableList()
209тЖТ        if (showAllDecks) {
210тЖТ            decks.add(SelectableDeck(ALL_DECKS_ID, context.resources.getString(R.string.card_browser_all_decks)))
211тЖТ        }
212тЖТ        val dialog = DeckSelectionDialog.newInstance(context.getString(R.string.search_deck), null, false, decks)
213тЖТ        AnkiActivity.showDialogFragment(mFragmentManagerSupplier.getFragmentManager(), dialog)
214тЖТ    }
215тЖТ
216тЖТ    companion object {
217тЖТ        const val ALL_DECKS_ID = 0L
218тЖТ    }
219тЖТ}
220тЖТ
